prompt:
A logbook page featuring three simple stick-figure constellation sketches—Orion, Ursa Major, and Cassiopeia—each drawn with dots and connecting lines, plus small orientation arrows. A small red-lens light and a planisphere sit nearby; any notes are intentionally illegible.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future stargazing kit aesthetic: soft low-light illumination, clean materials, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the constellation shapes bold and unmistakable at icon scale.
